snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: Independent read-only review audited the exact structured-data governance candidate. It verified narrative-versus-structured truth, source preservation, Dataset profiles and evidence refs, typed query/security boundaries, phase separation, UI simplicity, trace closure, unchanged statuses and fixed budgets; it reported CLEAR and made no edits.

dimensions.summary: The existing task router and Owner set absorb Dataset work without a new document, top-level UI destination, mode or duplicate lifecycle owner.
Owners agree that Markdown is narrative truth, Dataset Bundles are structured truth, originals are evidence and internal SQLite/indexes remain rebuildable.
Three planned Requirements, capabilities, Builds and Exits close P5 ingest, P6 local query/citations and P7 managed Collections with no existing status change.
Implementation can start with preserve-first read-only CSV/XLSX/database snapshots and typed queries while exact schemas, adapters, dependency pins and test gates remain explicit.
No Markdown file was added; 55 documents, 3,449 of 3,700 entry words and 1,143,714 of 1,210,000 governed Markdown bytes remain within ratcheted budgets.

verification.evidence: The final exact governance candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The PRD contract closes at 152/10/11 P0/P1/P2 items, 102 Requirements/capabilities, 144 Builds and 100 Exits; 87 Decisions and all four cross-document contract gates pass.
Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,130 claims; new Dataset Requirements and Exits are planned, all existing Requirement/Exit statuses and all ten phase states are unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 55 Markdown files, 3,449 of 3,700 entry words, 4,584 trace lines, 228,798 trace bytes and 1,143,714 of 1,210,000 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: First-class structured knowledge and Dataset Bundle governance
coordination.compatibility: This documentation-only candidate adds planned structured-data scope without implementation, dependencies, schema/API channels, UI navigation, phase renumbering or status promotion. Existing work continues unchanged.
coordination.acknowledgement: The user approved the architecture; Product Planning synchronized current Owners and trace controls, UI Design cleared the in-place read-only surface, and independent review cleared the exact candidate.

nonBlockingRisks: Dataset manifest, schema, change-log and evidence-reference contracts remain planned until shared executable schemas land.
Parquet, Arrow and DuckDB require exact dependency, licensing, packaging, no-network/extension and macOS/Windows validation before adoption.
CSV lexical round-trip, XLSX formula/cache semantics and hostile database fixtures still need executable losslessness and security evidence.
Managed Collection revision CAS, crash recovery, Activity/Undo and cross-process conflict handling remain unimplemented.
Large-table memory, paging, cancellation and 10-million-row packaged-platform evidence remain open.
Backup/restore and future sync must prove Dataset Bundle atomicity and compatibility before status changes.
